title: Causation (Etiology)
description: What caused what - causal chains, root causes, mechanisms

missing-registration-causes-unavailabili.cause: Controller created but not registered in TableRegistry
missing-registration-causes-unavailabili.effect: Entity stuck in 'upcoming' status, inaccessible via REST API
missing-registration-causes-unavailabili.description: Creating an API controller without registering it in TableRegistry.register() leaves the entity inaccessible
evidence: US-001: ProductController exists but Product in 'upcoming' array
US-002: AccountController registered and Account in 'available' array
missing-registration-causes-unavailabili.mechanism: TableRegistry.registerTables() populates available list; unregistered controllers never added

us-001-incomplete-api-layer.problem: Product entity not available via REST API despite controller existing
us-001-incomplete-api-layer.rootCause: Story scope stopped at canonical + data layers, API layer registration not included
us-001-incomplete-api-layer.description: US-001 delivered ProductController but didn't complete the final registration step in TableRegistry
us-001-incomplete-api-layer.fix: US-002 included full API layer with TableRegistry registration as core story requirement

dev-server-memory-crashes.problem: React Router dev server crashes with exit code 137
dev-server-memory-crashes.rootCause: Multiple Bun processes consuming system memory with dev server as final straw triggering OOM killer
dev-server-memory-crashes.description: System running many background Bun processes (hot reload servers from other projects) exhausts available memory
dev-server-memory-crashes.fix: Kill background processes before starting new dev servers, or use static validation as testing fallback
evidence: ps aux showing multiple bun --hot processes

table-registry-population.what: How TableRegistry determines which tables are available via API
table-registry-population.how: registerTables() method calls this.register() for each controller, which adds to available Map
steps: Each this.register(controller) adds controller to Map by table name
GET /tables endpoint serializes available, vetted, upcoming arrays
